label: 41106 Airlift service

children.label: A
children.text: has aircraft in the civil reserve air fleet or offers to place the aircraft in that fleet; and

children.label: B
children.text: holds a certificate issued under .section 41102 of this title
The Secretary of Transportation shall act as expeditiously as possible on an application for a certificate under to provide airlift service.section 41102 of this title

children.heading: .—Transportation Between the United States and Foreign Locations
children.label: b .—Transportation Between the United States and Foreign Locations
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (d), the transportation of passengers or property by CRAF-eligible aircraft between a place in the United States and a place outside the United States obtained by the Secretary of Defense or the Secretary of a military department through a contract for airlift service shall be provided by an air carrier referred to in subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Transportation Between Foreign Locations
children.label: c .—Transportation Between Foreign Locations
children.text: The transportation of passengers or property by CRAF-eligible aircraft between two places outside the United States obtained by the Secretary of Defense or the Secretary of a military department through a contract for airlift service shall be provided by an air carrier referred to in subsection (a) whenever transportation by such an air carrier is reasonably available.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: d .—Exception
children.text: When the Secretary of Defense decides that no air carrier holding a certificate under section 41102 is capable of providing, and willing to provide, the airlift service, the Secretary of Defense may make a contract to provide the service with an air carrier not having a certificate.

children.heading: .—CRAF-eligible Aircraft Defined
children.label: e .—CRAF-eligible Aircraft Defined
children.text: In this section, “CRAF-eligible aircraft” means aircraft of a type the Secretary of Defense has determined to be eligible to participate in the civil reserve air fleet.
